name: Uninsured other driver, used AI for advice—any coverage in Fort Worth?
description: UM policy likely covers; disclose minimally.[1]

mainEntity.name: Uninsured other driver, used AI for advice—any coverage in Fort Worth?

acceptedAnswer.text: UM policy likely covers; disclose minimally.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Check your uninsured motorist policy; AI doesn't affect coverage but chats may complicate claims.[1] Key factors: policy limits; prompt proof of fault; subrogation rights.[1] File UM claim fast; lawyer maximizes; avoid AI details with insurer.[1] Coverage often stacks.
